entry.title: The Gentle Animal
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,279Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 58

Summary: That was the thing no one warned you about. Not Bruce, not Alfred, not any of the dozens of mentors and teammates and temporary allies who'd cycled through his life like seasons. No one sat you down and said: one day you'll love someone so completely that the thought of losing them will make you into something ugly. Something with teeth and claws and a hunger that no amount of reason could cage.DickJay Week 2026 - Day 2 - Obsessive Dick

entry.title: I'm Here
entry.summary:
Author: DovesNotDead

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,256Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: "Jay, sweetheart," Dick tried as he reached the pile of blankets that likely held his boyfriend. Admittedly, it was a little hard to tell just judging by the lump under the duvet, as the guest bed was also Jason's go-to place to store all his gifted blankets, pillows, and stuffed animals that he'd compiled over the year of Dick dating him.Jason isn't used to having someone there to comfort him. Dick is trying to change that.

entry.title: Cheat Day
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,797Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 194

Summary: Dick has been enjoying his roommate Jason's cooking a little too much. He tries to go on a diet, and fails spectacularly.Update: I added a second chapter, in which Dick hits a huge milestone.Jan 6 Update: I added art to the end of chapter 2 and a new chapter, which involves a dozen donuts and a desk chair not built to handle chunky Dick Grayson.

entry.title: starvation
entry.summary:
Author: jikkyuu

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 589Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 51

Summary: It's a familiar pattern by now; Dick approaches the edge of the forest with a handful of gifts, drops them at the same spot as usual, then leaves. It's a delicate process, especially because Jason's still so fidgety and distrustful, despite Dick's constant efforts to show him that, no matter what he became, he still cares. Dick might be a vampire now, but Jason's well-being is still his top priority. --- Dickjay Week 2026 Day 1: DC vs. Vampires

entry.title: Care and Keeping
entry.summary:
Author: kitnotkat95

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,913Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 45

Summary: "It's just a cold or flu or something, fuck off." Jason tried to sound snappish, like a dog that was ready to bite, but from the look on Dick's face he must've sounded more like a stubborn kid."C'mon, you don't need to be out like this," Dick insisted, staring him down expectantly. "We can go wherever your staying or I can drag you back to the manor."Jason didn't have any reason to listen to Dick really, he had a couple safehouses he could've made a break for, and yet something in that tone of voice Dick used made him want to, or maybe that was just the fever he may or may not have had talking.or Jason's not about to skip patrol for something as stupid as being a little sick, but for some reason Dick takes issue with that and the night only gets more confusing from thereFor DickJay Week Prompt: Jason Reluctantly Accepting Comfort

entry.title: Mission: Get Dick Pregnant
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,529Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 30

Summary: Dick gets shot during a mission and a doctors tells Bruce he's had a miscarriage. This is 2 months after the sex pollen thing but Dick didn't know about it.Bruce is feeling guilty for everything that's happened, and when Dick feels better and goes back home, they all have A Very Important Talk.Turns out, after a lot of thinking, Dick wants to try to get pregnant... this time intentionally. And he wants Bruce to reverse his vasectomy!How will this affect their lives? How will their friends and other heroes act when it's known a few intimate details about their whole relationship?

entry.title: Shíoraíocht | Noun | Eternity
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,284Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 53

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 1)DC vs. Vampires | Forced Proximity | Heartbeat Kink | Jason Reluctantly Accepting Comfort It's been over 300 years since the end of Nightwing, the Vampire King —over 300 years of loneliness, suffering, self-reflection, and waiting. Living, quite literally, as if he were dead —just waiting for him. He finds him in Scotland, of all things. Living a simple life in a quaint town, far away from any soul that ever knew him. A part of him knows he should leave him alone, watch him from afar, if anything —let him be happy and normal, like he always wished. Another knows there is no way for him to stay away. Twice he promised to take care of him, and twice he has failed him. He will make good on that promise; all he needs is eternity.

entry.title: Perpetuity
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,193Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 99

Summary: Dick clicked his tongue, reaching out to smooth the furrow between Jason's brows. "So impatient. We have all night. All of eternity, actually." His fingers drifted lower, tracing the sharp angle of Jason's cheekbone, the stubborn curve of his jaw. "And you know I like to take my time with you."DickJay Week 2026 - Day 1 - DC vs. Vampires | Forced Proximity

entry.title: Heart Will Keep Beating
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,207Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: Jason isn't just Dick's prisoner. He's Dick's cattle—a plaything and domesticated blood-slave to be fed and fattened just so the vampire king can drain him on each full moon's night. A ritual that the king keeps, for whatever twisted reason. Dick has a special taste for Jason’s blood, as if it’s less of a course and more of a drug, fueling the vampire king’s monthly flare of addiction. On every full moon, a change will take place in Dick. His irises will take over his eyes; he will then be overtaken by an urge to clutch Jason to him, pierce his jugular with his teeth, and drink until Jason is on the doorstep of Death. Dickjay Week 2026 Day 1: DC vs. Vampires + Heartbeat Kink

entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,676Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 1,338

Summary: Damian has tried his best to become the partner that his Father needs, but it seems that his Father does not approve of Robin's style and methods. A night of yelling is enough to set things in motion, were Damain realizes that his Father isn't who he wants to be partners with, but perhaps a certain brother will aid where his Father has not.
